body:
## Summary
- add focused countdown validation for the first civic-test sitting date and source URL
- make validate-content fail if Home stops importing or mounting CountdownBanner with the selected language
- expose countdown Home mount fields in focused and full validation summaries

## Verification
- `NODE_PATH=/home/billy/Swedish_Civic_Test/node_modules PATH=/home/billy/Swedish_Civic_Test/node_modules/.bin:$PATH NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' node --test tests/content-countdown-banner-parity.test.js --test-name-pattern "countdown banner|Home|CountdownBanner"`
- `NODE_PATH=/home/billy/Swedish_Civic_Test/node_modules PATH=/home/billy/Swedish_Civic_Test/node_modules/.bin:$PATH NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' npm run validate:content`
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' npm run typecheck -- --pretty false`
- `git diff --check`
title: test: guard countdown banner home mount
